results.definition_en: Not all, but a part of a group or amount.
results.example_en: I have some apples in my bag.

results.definition_en: Of this sort or that sort.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 這樣的、那樣的；如此（這般）。
results.example_en: I have never seen such a beautiful flower.
results.example_zh_tw: 我從沒看過這麼漂亮的花。

results.definition_en: Word used to point to a thing not near, or one talked about.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 那、那個（指較遠的人事物）。
results.example_en: That book on the shelf is mine.

results.definition_en: Word used to point to a thing near, or just talked about.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 這、這個（指較近的人事物）。

results.definition_en: The word the person talking uses for himself.
Word used for a man or boy talked about.
The word used for the person or persons being talked to.
Word used to ask about a person.
Word used to put two things together.
results.example_en: I have a cat and a dog.

results.definition_en: Word used to say the reason for a thing.
results.example_en: I am tired because I worked all day.
results.example_zh_tw: 我累是因為我工作了一整天。

results.definition_en: Word used to say a thing that is not the same.
results.example_en: I am tired, but I am happy.

results.definition_en: Word used to give a different choice between two things.
Word used to say a thing may be, but is not certain.
results.example_en: If it rains, we will stay at home.
results.example_zh_tw: 如果下雨，我們就待在家。

results.definition_en: Word used to say a thing that is true even when another thing is true.
results.example_en: Though it was cold, she went out.
results.example_zh_tw: 雖然天氣冷，她還是出門了。

results.definition_en: During the time that a thing is going on.
Word used to ask in what way a thing is done.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 如何、怎麼；用於詢問方式。
results.example_en: How do you make this cake?

results.definition_en: Word used to ask or say at what time a thing is.
Word used to ask or say in what place a thing is.
Word used to ask the reason for a thing.
One more time.
At any time.
results.example_en: Have you ever seen a star fall?

results.definition_en: A long way from a place.
results.example_en: The school is not far from my house.

results.definition_en: To the front, or in the way one is looking.
In this place, near to the person talking.
Not far from a place or thing.
results.example_en: The shop is near my house.
